name: Italian Pizzelles
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Butter, margarine, or oil, melted (1/4 lb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs and sugar until combined.
2. Add cooled melted butter or margarine, vanilla, and anise to the egg mixture.
3. Sift flour and baking powder into a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the egg mixture in three additions, stirring gently after each addition.
5. The batter will be stiff enough to drop by spoonfuls onto hot pizzelle maker or griddle.
6. Batter can be refrigerated for up to 24 hours before use.
7. This recipe yields approximately 30 pizelles.
